metadata.description: Bootstrapper for Claude Code — populate a repository's .project/ house docs from canonical templates and make the repo suite-ready for milestone-feeder and milestone-driver.

plugins.name: milestone-bootstrapper
plugins.description: Populate a repository's .project/ house docs from canonical templates and make the repo suite-ready, so milestone-feeder and milestone-driver have grounded conventions to plan and build against. Authors no code.
